title: Rainbow Six Siege
body:
## **The playable Rainbow Six Siege Modpack**
This modpack includes the **Beta version** of the Rainbow Six Siege remake in Minecraft. (See features below)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PwGyOuY3fKA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

### Credits:
- Created by [FunTime](https://www.youtube.com/@ImFunTime)
### Features _(so far)_
v 1.1.1 of this modpack / world includes the following:
- 🗺️ **Maps** - Re-made by hand, currently includes Oregon, Coastline & Chalet
- ♻️ **Round Based Gameplay** - Pick, Prep, Action and Pre-Game Phases!
- ⚙️ **Custom Settings** - Including Round Number, Team Swapping, Friendly Fire and more!
- 🔊 **Enhanced Audio** - With [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) & [Sound Physics Remastered](https://modrinth.com/mod/sound-physics-remastered)
- 🎙️ **Voice Chat** - With [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) & [Enhanced Groups!](https://modrinth.com/mod/enhanced-groups)
- 🤝 **Teams** - Attackers and Defenders!
- 🔫 **Guns** - From [Point Blank Jelly](https://modrinth.com/mod/pb-jelly)!
- 🔧 **Utility** - Working Frag Grenades, Flash Grenades, C4, Cameras, Drones and more!
- ⚔️ **Operators** - 19 total, 8 Attack & 11 Defense.
- 🧎‍♂️ **Crawling / Proning** - With [FSit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fsit)!
- 🩹 **DBNO** -  With [Incapacitated](https://modrinth.com/mod/incapacitated)!
- 🚧 **Reinforcements** - Accessible by Defenders, counters soft-breaching utility!
- 📌 **Objectives** - Attacker defusing + Multiple Bombsite Locations
- 🎮 **Controller Support** - With [Controlify](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlify)!
- 👥 **Multiplayer Compatible** - With [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)!

- ❗ **& more!**

<details>
<summary>Gameplay Tips</summary>
  
  ###   How To Play
  - **Join the world and type ***/reload*** just to be safe**
  - **Type */trigger gm.*** *(if that doesn't work type **/scoreboard players enable @s gm** first)*
  - **Open world to lan using e4mc.**
  - **Share the link with your friends.**
  - **Use the compass to start the game or change its settings.**
  - **Notable settings include**
     - Number of Rounds
     - Rounds Between Roll Swap
     - Friendly Fire
  - **Use the compass to select your weapons, utility, special utility & spawn locations.**
  - **Play the game as you'd expect to! *(and if you don't know how, why are you here?)***
  
  - *Any other information can likely be found in the video at the top of the page!*
  - *Please report any bugs to the discord server, also at the top of the page.*
</details>
